page: UpCloud GPU-12xCPU-128GB-1xL4 is a GPU-accelerated server configured with 12 vCPUs powered by an AMD EPYC 9575F processor on the x86_64 architecture. It features 128.0 GB of system memory, providing 10.67 GB per core. Acceleration is delivered via a single NVIDIA L4 GPU based on the Ada Lovelace architecture, equipped with 24 GB of VRAM. This instance does not include local storage and runs on the KVM hypervisor.

Benchmark results show top-tier single-core performance, with stress-ng single-core CPU and single-threaded gzip compression scoring in the top 10%. Multi-core performance and Passmark CPU scores sit in the average tier. Large-block memory bandwidth is strong, placing in the top 25% for both read and write operations. For AI workloads, LLM inference text generation using a small model achieves top-tier throughput at 345.71 tokens per second, while prompt processing remains in the average tier.

The server's shared CPU allocation represents a potential tradeoff for sustained multi-core compute-bound tasks, though its single-core capabilities remain highly competitive. Given the combination of a 24 GB NVIDIA L4 GPU, high memory capacity, and strong memory bandwidth, this configuration is well-suited for machine learning inference, data science, graphics rendering, and memory-intensive GPU-accelerated workloads.
description: The UpCloud GPU-12xCPU-128GB-1xL4 is a GPU-accelerated server featuring an AMD EPYC 9575F processor with 12 vCPUs and 128.0 GB of system memory. It integrates a single NVIDIA L4 GPU with 24 GB of VRAM based on the Ada Lovelace architecture. Running on the KVM hypervisor, this instance does not include local storage. In benchmark testing, the server demonstrates top-tier single-core CPU performance and single-threaded compression speeds, alongside strong large-block memory bandwidth. LLM text generation performance is also highly competitive, reaching top-tier speeds for small models. However, its shared CPU allocation is a notable tradeoff for sustained multi-threaded workloads. This server is designed for GPU-accelerated tasks, machine learning inference, and memory-intensive data processing workloads.
